results.title: JavaScript Course for Beginners – Your First Step to Web Development
results.reason: Mosh is widely cited in comments for his 'clean code' approach and logical pacing, making this the gold standard for absolute beginners.
summary: Learn how to set up your coding environment
Understand how to use variables and constants
Work with different types of simple data
Create basic functions to run your code

results.title: How JavaScript Works 🔥& Execution Context | Namaste JavaScript Ep.1
results.reason: Akshay Saini is legendary for explaining 'how' JS works, but the depth of execution contexts may be too advanced for a first-day beginner.
summary: See how the browser reads your code
Learn how computer memory stores your data
Understand the two steps of running code
Discover how code executes line by line

results.title: 100+ JavaScript Concepts you Need to Know
results.reason: Fireship provides high-speed 'edutainment' that is excellent for a broad overview, though beginners may find the 100-concept pace overwhelming.
summary: Explore a wide range of coding terms
Learn about modern tools and web features
Understand how data moves through a website
Get a quick look at advanced logic

results.title: All The JavaScript You Need To Know For React
results.reason: Highly effective for those with a specific goal (React), but skips some general JS fundamentals that a total beginner might need first.
summary: Master the specific math and logic rules
Learn how to transform lists of data
Understand how to import and export files
Practice the syntax used in modern apps

results.title: Learn JavaScript in 60 Minutes: The Ultimate Beginner Course!
results.reason: The 75-minute duration allows for a much better learning curve and more examples than the shorter 'minutes' style videos.
summary: Build a solid foundation of basic concepts
Learn how to make decisions with code
Understand how to repeat tasks using loops
Create a simple project from start to finish
